Text.Page:
I came out here with dreams of finding some ancient relic and selling it at an obscene price. All I've collected, though, is sand...in my shoes.

I'm certain there's rare materials out here, but I'm under orders not to leave. Could you search for me? I'll pay you.
Oh, fantastic. These should fetch a fine price in Tulufan. Thank you.
Keep looking, <PCNAME>. I just know there's something out there.
